script:
set -e; CATID=775dd505-72a7-45d6-8ff2-bc2bb8d84666; echo '===== Upload v1.2 appDefinition ====='; TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); RESP=$(curl -sS -w "
__HTTP__:%{http_code}" -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CATID/appDefinitions?requiresReview=false" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/zip" --data-binary @/home/azureuser/rosi-teams-app/rosi-teams-app-v1.2.zip); CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "  http_code=$CODE"; echo "$RESP" | grep -v '__HTTP__' | jq '{teamsAppId, version, displayName, publishingState}'; if [ "$CODE" = "201" ] || [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then echo; echo '===== Set env var + restart ====='; for svc in rosi-bot rosi-responder; do sudo mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d; printf '[Service]
Environment="ROSI_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID=%s"
' "$CATID" | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d/catalog-id.conf >/dev/null; done; sudo systemctl daemon-reload; sudo systemctl restart rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; sleep 2; systemctl is-active rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; fi
